info.title: CROSSUB API
info.description: CROSSUB property-management API — full internal contract.

documentPath.description: Relative API path to download the agreement document.

signerName.description: Full legal name of the signer.

agreed.description: Must be true — confirms the user has read and agrees to the agreement.

accessToken.description: JWT access token — send as Authorization: Bearer <token>.

refreshToken.description: JWT refresh token — send in the body to POST /api/v1/auth/refresh.

user.description: The authenticated user (id, email, role key, status, …).

refreshToken.description: The refresh token returned by POST /api/v1/auth/login or /api/v1/auth/refresh.

contentBase64.description: File contents, base64-encoded (no data: URI prefix).

contractorId.description: Verified-network catalogue id (e.g. c1–c8), or null for agency-only entries.

serviceTypes.description: Trade / service types the contractor covers.

sortOrder.description: The agency's preference order for this contractor.

isVerifiedNetwork.description: Whether this entry is linked to the verified-network catalogue.

isPreferred.description: Always true here — every recommendation comes from the agency preferred list.

isBlacklisted.description: Excluded contractors are never returned; always false.

matchScore.description: Composite ranking weight (trade matches dominate; verified breaks ties).

matchedServiceTypes.description: Service types whose tokens matched the request issue text.

isTopPick.description: The single top-ranked pick — the auto-assign default.

rating.description: No rating data exists; always null.

distanceKm.description: No geo data exists; always null.

agencyId.description: The request property's agency, or null if the request has no linked property.

recommendations.description: Ranked recommendations (best first). Empty when the agency has no preferred contractors.

preferredContractorId.description: The AgencyPreferredContractor id to assign (from this request's contractor recommendations).

propertyId.description: Target property. Optional: inferred when the tenant has exactly one active tenancy; required (400) when they have several. Always validated against the tenant's scope.

photos.description: Up to 5 already-uploaded photo URLs (the app uploads first).

clientRequestId.description: Opt-in idempotency key. Re-sending the same key returns 409 Conflict (pointing at the original ticket). Omit it and every submission creates a new ticket.

orderNumber.description: Human-facing order number assigned to app-created tickets.

propertyId.description: The property the request was filed against (server-resolved).

mimeType.description: An image/* or video/* MIME type (repair evidence is photo or clip).

contentBase64.description: The file contents, base64-encoded (no data: URI prefix).

url.description: Public url of the uploaded photo.

propertyAddress.description: The property the request was filed against.

hasMore.description: Whether a further page exists after this one.
Whether a further page exists after this one.
Whether a further page exists after this one.

direction.description: IN = money received by the tenant, OUT = money paid by the tenant.

amount.description: Settled amount (finalAmount, else amount) in AUD.

hasMore.description: Whether a further page exists after this one.

reportUrl.description: URL of the generated inspection report PDF, when available.

hasMore.description: Whether a further page exists after this one.

uploadedAt.description: When the source row was created/completed.

isRenewal.description: Whether this is a lease-renewal application.

hasMore.description: Whether a further page exists after this one.

effectiveDate.description: When the new rent takes effect (newRentStartsFrom).

explanation.description: Rationale / decision note for the review, when present.

tenantCounterWeekly.description: The weekly rent the tenant has countered with, when in negotiation.

status.description: Whether the vacating case is active or has been withdrawn.

currentStage.description: Current end-leasing phase (mirrors staff dashboard tabs).

initialVacatingDate.description: Original vacate date when the case was opened (for change detection).

vacateDateChanged.description: True when the vacate date differs from the original.

keysReturned.description: Whether keys have been returned to the agent.

outgoingInspectionId.description: Linked outgoing inspection id, when scheduled.

inspectionReportAvailable.description: Outgoing inspection report is available for review.

tenantSettlementStatus.description: Tenant response to proposed bond deductions.

tenantConfirmationDueAt.description: Deadline for tenant to accept or decline settlement.

terminationReason.description: Plain-language reason the lease is ending, when present.

cancellationReason.description: Why the case was withdrawn, when cancelled.

body.example: Your inspection is booked for Tuesday.

fromSelf.description: True when this message was sent by the tenant themselves (so the app can align it as their own bubble).

channel.description: The channel the message was sent on (APP / EMAIL / …).

unread.description: Unread message count on the conversation.

body.example: The kitchen tap is leaking — could someone take a look?

department.description: Staff queue to route the thread to. Defaults to GENERAL.

propertyId.description: The leased property the thread is about. Omit for a general enquiry.

body.example: Tuesday 10am works — thanks.
A technician has been scheduled for your bathroom fan.

actionRequired.description: Optional call-to-action label; null when there is nothing to action.

updated.description: How many notifications were flipped to read.

id.description: Tenant-app step id (deposit, bond, lease_signing, key_pickup, ingoing_report).

description.example: Confirm when and where you will collect the keys.

status.description: Leasing item status (not_started | in_progress | waiting | blocked | done).

photos.description: Key collection proof photos (key collection report).

photoUrls.description: Public URLs of uploaded key-collection proof photos (Handover.photos).

acceptingApplications.description: Whether the tenant app should offer the apply flow (vacant/showing or active leasing open-inspection phase).

bondAmount.description: Rental bond from the active leasing cycle.

depositAmount.description: Holding deposit from the active leasing cycle.

clientRequestId.description: Optional idempotency key from the client.

landlordName.description: Landlord contact name on file (denormalized snapshot).

tenantName.description: Current tenant name on file (denormalized snapshot), if leased.

leaseStatus.description: Lease standing derived from the property status + active lease.

rentWeekly.description: Weekly rent of the active lease, AUD.

propertyManager.description: The assigned Account Manager (property manager) for the agency.

lastInspectionAt.description: When the property was last inspected.

nextInspectionAt.description: When the property is next due for inspection.

hasMore.description: Whether a further page exists after this one.
Whether a further page exists after this one.

reportUrl.description: URL of the generated inspection report PDF, when available.

hasMore.description: Whether a further page exists after this one.

netAmount.description: Net amount paid out to the owner (AUD).

hasMore.description: Whether a further page exists after this one.

approvedInvoices.description: Approved property invoices deducted this month (AUD).

netToLandlord.description: Server-computed net paid to the landlord (AUD).

paymentDate.description: When the payment was received (ledger occurredAt).

dueDate.description: Outstanding since (the arrears case open date).

uploadedAt.description: When the source row was created/completed.

body.example: Your June statement is ready.

fromSelf.description: True when this message was sent by the landlord themselves (so the app can align it as their own bubble).

unread.description: Unread message count on the conversation.

body.example: Could you confirm the management fee on my June statement?

department.description: Staff queue to route the thread to. Defaults to GENERAL.

propertyId.description: An owned property the thread is about. Omit for a general enquiry.

body.example: Thanks — that clears it up.

description.example: The unit’s hot water system has failed and needs replacing.

status.description: The decision — APPROVED, DECLINED, or MORE_INFO (PENDING is rejected).

note.example: Approved — please proceed with the quoted contractor.

body.example: $850 rent received for 2 Mobile Way.

updated.description: How many notifications were flipped to read.

propertyAddress.description: Site address to attend (from the linked property).

quote.description: The contractor’s latest own-submitted quote for this job, or null. Its presence (while the job is still pre-scheduled) is what puts the job in the app’s “awaiting quotation approval” bucket — no status transition is implied.

hasMore.description: Whether a further page exists after this one.

feedback.description: Optional completion note recorded against the job.

invoiceAmount.description: Invoiced total, inc-GST (AUD). Defaults to unset if omitted.

callOutFee.description: Call-out fee, if a site visit applies (AUD).

clientRequestId.description: Opt-in idempotency key — a reused key returns 409.

photos.description: Up to 10 photo URLs to append to the job result photos.

requestPhotos.description: Photos supplied with the original request (read-only here).

resultPhotos.description: Result/evidence photos the contractor has attached.

mimeType.description: An image/* or video/* MIME type (completion evidence is photo or clip).

contentBase64.description: The file contents, base64-encoded (no data: URI prefix).

body.example: I can be home all day Thursday for the visit.

fromSelf.description: True when this message was sent by the signed-in contractor (so the app can align it as their own bubble).

jobId.description: The assigned job this thread is about (the maintenance caseId), or null for a general enquiry.

jobTrackingNumber.description: The linked job's tracking number (orderNumber), resolved from jobId.

unread.description: Unread message count on the conversation.

body.example: Can the tenant confirm access for Thursday 9am?

jobId.description: An assigned job the thread is about. Omit for a general enquiry.

body.example: Thanks — I will attend Thursday morning.
Replace the leaking hot-water valve at 1 Mobile Way — respond within 4 hours.

jobTrackingNumber.description: The linked job's tracking number (orderNumber), resolved from jobId.

updated.description: How many notifications were flipped to read.

hasMore.description: Whether a further page exists after this one.

type.description: What kind of inspection this is.

status.description: Lifecycle state. An inspector drives DRAFT → IN_PROGRESS (accept) → COMPLETED (complete); the staff review chain is staff-only.

propertyLatitude.description: WGS84 latitude of the inspection site (when geocoded on the property).

propertyLongitude.description: WGS84 longitude of the inspection site (when geocoded on the property).

hasMore.description: Whether a further page exists after this one.

collectComplete.description: Whether key collection has been recorded.

returnComplete.description: Whether key return has been recorded.

photoRequired.description: Whether the inspector must attach a proof photo to record collect/return.

reason.example: Vehicle broke down — cannot reach the property today.

mode.description: 'release_pool' returns the job for anyone to claim; 'flag_admin' also marks it for staff attention and hides it from this inspector’s own pool.

rating.description: The app's condition label — stored raw (ratingRaw) and mapped best-effort onto the ConditionRating enum.

flagged.description: Whether the item was flagged for attention.

ratingRaw.description: The raw condition label as submitted (the app's own vocabulary) — prefer this over the mapped enum when displaying an app-authored area.

photos.description: Area-level photos (item-level photos appear under their item).
Photos attached to the inspection itself (not to any area or item).

startTime.description: When the inspector started on site (ISO 8601).

endTime.description: When the inspector finished on site (ISO 8601).

reportUrl.description: Optional URL of the generated inspection report.
URL of the generated inspection report (PDF).

signName.description: Name captured on the report sign-off.

signUrl.description: URL of the captured signature image.

mimeType.description: An image/* or video/* MIME type (inspection evidence is photo or clip).

contentBase64.description: The file contents, base64-encoded (no data: URI prefix).

areaName.description: Attach the photo to this area (find-or-create among the app-authored areas) instead of the inspection level.

phase.description: Which custody phase this proof photo belongs to.

mimeType.description: An image/* or video/* MIME type (custody proof is a photo or clip).

contentBase64.description: The file contents, base64-encoded (no data: URI prefix).

notes.description: Optional free-text note for this custody phase.

body.example: The tenant will be home for the 9am visit.

fromSelf.description: True when this message was sent by the signed-in inspector (so the app can align it as their own bubble).

inspectionId.description: The assigned inspection this thread is about (the INSPECTION caseId), or null for a general enquiry.

inspectionTrackingNumber.description: The linked inspection's tracking reference, resolved from inspectionId.

unread.description: Unread message count on the conversation.

body.example: Can the tenant confirm access for Friday 9am?

inspectionId.description: An assigned inspection the thread is about. Omit for a general enquiry.

body.example: Thanks — I will attend Friday morning.
Routine inspection at 1 Mobile Way — accept and schedule a visit.

inspectionTrackingNumber.description: The linked inspection's tracking reference, resolved from inspectionId.

updated.description: How many notifications were flipped to read.

caseSummary.description: The case trigger label (the staff module’s case summary line).

hearingDate.description: Hearing date (ISO date string) — null until staff schedule it.

evidenceComplete.description: Whether the staff pre-hearing review found the evidence complete.

outcomeResult.description: Staff-recorded outcome (FE literal, e.g. 'claim_successful') — null until recorded.

attendanceRecorded.description: Whether the inspector’s hearing attendance has been billed by staff.

closed.description: Whether the case is in a closed status (COMPLETED / CLOSED).

receivingPoolJobs.description: When true the inspector is open to pool jobs and appears on the ops dispatch list.

averageRating.description: Average performance rating (1–5). Null until enough completed jobs.

lateArrivals.description: Late arrival count used in dispatch scoring.

bankAccountLast4.description: Last 4 digits of the bank account number (full number never echoed).

bankAccountNumber.description: Confidential — stored; only the last 4 digits are ever echoed.

receivingPoolJobs.description: When true the inspector appears in the ops dispatch list and receives pool jobs.

hasMore.description: Whether a further page exists after this one.

leaseStatus.description: Lease standing derived from the property status + active lease.

rentWeekly.description: Weekly rent of the active lease, AUD.

hasMore.description: Whether a further page exists after this one.

lifecycleStep.description: Leasing lifecycle step (FE slug), or null when no cycle exists.

status.description: Key-collection item status (not_started | in_progress | waiting | blocked | done).

time.description: When the tenant collects the keys.

photos.description: Key-collection proof photo URLs (from the photo-upload endpoint).

mimeType.description: An image/* or video/* MIME type.

contentBase64.description: The file contents, base64-encoded (no data: URI prefix).

url.description: Public URL of the stored photo.

quoteTotal.description: Total of the latest quote, AUD.

rentPaidYtd.description: Sum of RENT ledger entries, AUD.

daysInArrears.description: Days in arrears (0 when not in arrears).

body.example: Can we bring the inspection forward?

fromSelf.description: True when this message was sent by CROSSUB staff/the agent (so the app can align it as their own bubble).

caseId.description: The id of the case this thread is about.

unread.description: Unread message count on the conversation.

selectedMailboxId.description: When set, external threads are filtered to this linked mailbox.

gmail.description: Gmail OAuth client id + secret are set on the API server.

yahoo.description: Yahoo OAuth client id + secret are set on the API server.

encryptionKey.description: MAILBOX_TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY is set (required to store tokens).

authorizationUrl.description: Provider OAuth consent URL — redirect the browser here.

body.example: Thanks — we will follow up shortly.
Can we move the routine inspection to next week?

department.description: Staff queue to route the thread to. Defaults to GENERAL.

propertyId.description: A managed property the thread is about. Omit for a general enquiry.

body.example: Confirmed — booked for next Tuesday.
A $480 plumbing quote needs your approval for 12/45 Campbell Parade.

actionRequired.example: Approve or decline the contractor quote.

updated.description: How many notifications were flipped to read.

contentBase64.description: The file contents, base64-encoded (no data: URI prefix).

propertyId.description: A managed property the document is about. Omit for a portfolio-level doc.

reason.example: Quote above budget — please re-quote with cheaper parts.

propertyId.description: The property this tenant is linked to (via their application), if any.

applicationId.description: The application that anchored this tenant login.

hasMore.description: Whether a further page exists after this one.

password.description: Initial password to share with the tenant. Hashed with Argon2; never persisted in clear text.

applicationId.description: Approved rental application — links the new login to the applicant Person and advances onboarding.

role.description: Role key from the verified token.

personId.description: External-party domain anchor (Person id); null for internal staff.

token.description: The opaque provider push token (FCM / APNs / Expo).
The push token to remove (e.g. on logout).
